response.justification: Szabo brings strong software engineering fundamentals and proven experience building platforms at scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby), with technical depth across multiple languages and domains. However, the resume lacks critical domain expertise in growth and experimentation systems—no evidence of A/B testing infrastructure, experimentation platforms, metrics/telemetry systems, feature-flagging, or rollout risk management. While capable of learning, these gaps are substantial for a Principal-level role specializing in experimentation systems.
strengths: Demonstrated ability to build high-scale systems with millions of concurrent requests and real-time performance requirements at Dunnhumby
Strong software engineering fundamentals: TDD practice, CI/CD infrastructure setup, mentoring, and polyglot technical versatility across C, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, and DLang
Platform-building experience (GISCollective, open-source contributions) showing ownership of systemic solutions and ability to influence across users/teams
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or working with experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or A/B testing infrastructure
Missing expertise in metrics, telemetry, data-driven experimentation, bias detection, and rollout risk management—core to the role's responsibilities

Career shows senior individual contributor progression but limited evidence of principal-level architectural leadership spanning multiple product teams or cross-functional influence at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of experimentation/growth systems domain knowledge
Proven platform development and scale experience
Strong software craftsmanship and technical fundamentals
